app.title: Mood Journal
app.subtitle: Track your mood daily
app.description: A simple mood tracking and journaling app to help you understand your emotional patterns over time. Record moods, write journals, add photos, and discover emotional patterns.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noRecords: No records yet. Start your first entry!

journal.title: Journal
journal.noResultsWithFilters: No records match the selected filters
journal.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this entry? This action cannot be undone.

editor.title: Record Mood
editor.useTemplate: Use a journal template to start writing quickly

sync.title: Cloud Sync
sync.description: Sync your data to the cloud for consistency across multiple devices

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Enable data encryption to protect your journal
privacy.notEncrypted: Data is stored in plain text

export.title: Export Data
export.description: Export all records as JSON file

clear.title: Clear Data
clear.description: This action cannot be undone. Please proceed with caution.
clear.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all data?

clearDraft.title: Clear Draft Data
clearDraft.description: Clear auto-saved draft data when creating new entries (drafts are not created in edit mode)
clearDraft.confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all draft data? This will delete unsaved drafts from the editor.

customFactors.title: Custom Factors
customFactors.description: Add, edit and manage custom factor tags
customFactors.factorNamePlaceholder: Enter factor name, e.g., Pet, Music
customFactors.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this factor?

about.title: About
about.description: A simple mood tracking and journaling app. All data is securely stored on your local device and will not be uploaded to any server.
about.storageNote: All data is saved in browser localStorage only

security.title: Password Protection
security.description: Set a password to protect your journal privacy
security.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
security.updateQuestionsDescription: Please set 1-5 security questions for password recovery
security.securityQuestionsDescription: Please set 1-5 security questions for password recovery
security.question: Question

questions.pet: What was the name of your childhood pet?
questions.school: What was the name of your elementary school?
questions.city: What city were you born in?
questions.mother: What is your mother's maiden name?

security.answersIncorrect: Answers are incorrect, please try again
security.lockoutMessage: Too many failed attempts. Please try again in {minutes} minutes
security.passwordChangeFailed: Password change failed, please try again
security.passwordResetFailed: Password reset failed, please try again

reminder.title: Record Today's Mood
reminder.message: You haven't recorded your mood today. Take a minute to record it!

templates.title: Choose Journal Template
templates.subtitle: Select a template to start writing quickly
templates.noFavorites: No favorite templates yet, click the star to add
templates.titlePlaceholder: Enter template title, e.g., Morning Journal
templates.contentPlaceholder: Enter template content, you can use variables like {{date}}, {{weekday}}, etc.
templates.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this custom template? This action cannot be undone.

sync.disabledDescription: Enable sync to synchronize data across devices
sync.syncError: Sync error, please try again later
sync.wifiOnlyDesc: Only sync when connected to WiFi to save mobile data
sync.conflictStrategyDesc: How to handle conflicts between local and cloud data
sync.privacyDesc: Your data is encrypted during transmission. Sync requires network connection and data will be stored on remote servers.
sync.conflictDescription: Some entries were modified on multiple devices. Please review and resolve the conflicts.

api.networkError: Network connection failed, please check your network settings
api.serverError: Server error, please try again later

api.forbidden: No permission to perform this action

auth.unknownError: An unknown error occurred, please try again later
